title: Terralith: Forevermore
body: Terralith Foreverworld is a next-generation exploration modpack built for long-term survival worlds. Featuring Terralith, Tectonic, Incendium, and Nullscape, it delivers massive biome variety, dramatic terrain, and fully overhauled dimensions. Your world is packed with upgraded structures, new dungeons, revitalized villages, expanded farming, smarter inventory tools, and deeper adventure progression. Visual upgrades like Fresh Animations, Better Leaves, shaders, HD textures, and 3D models create a cinematic experience, while performance mods like Sodium, Lithium, C2ME, and Distant Horizons keep everything smooth at scale. Designed for a true “forever world,” this pack blends beauty, challenge, and stability for endless discovery.
